about.description: Tony&Son is a hair salon founded in 1970 by Tony Campisi and taken over by his son Salvatore, trained at the Toni&Guy school. At Tony&Son, we believe confidence starts with a hairstyle that looks like you.
about.welcomeText: At Tony&Son, we believe confidence starts with a hairstyle that looks like you. Our passionate team puts its expertise at your service for cuts, transformations and personalized advice.
about.historyText: Tony&Son is a hair salon founded in 1970 by Tony Campisi and taken over by his son Salvatore, trained at the prestigious Toni&Guy school. We combine family tradition and modern creativity to offer you a unique experience.

services.sectionTitle: The Art of Enhancing Your Style
services.description: We put our expertise at your service for cuts, precision shaving, or personalized hair care.
services.cutDesc: Custom cuts that reflect your personality and enhance your style.
services.colorDesc: Vibrant and long-lasting colors created with the best professional products.
services.stylingDesc: Expert styling for every occasion, from everyday to special events.

team.description: Passionate and experienced hairdressers at your service.
